morning_brief.preview:
# EverPass Morning Brief — Wednesday, May 6, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive
1. **Charter / Taylor — Counter expected by end of week (5/6–5/9); NBA scope reply still unsent.** Holden 5/5 confirmed "made some good progress, hopefully something by end of week." First soft counter commitment since 4/15. NBA scope question (T-Wolves/Spurs: is EverPass the only commercial source for these exclusives?) has Ryan's reply drafted from 5/5 01:43Z — needs his send. NBC commercial grant confirmed does NOT include NBA.
2. **NESN — Plaehn chasing v7 response (2nd chase, 5/5 17:08Z).** Term sheet in NESN court since 4/12. Second direct chase now on record. Reputational window closing fast — respond within today or tomorrow.
3. **AccuWeather — McCormack scheduling Fri 5/8 call.** Proposed 9:00–10:30 AM PT or 12:30–1:30 PM PT Friday. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Ryan owes scheduling reply today.
4. **Monumental — DocuSign pending Ryan sign.** Bernheimer 4/29 sent DocuSign; 5/1 follow-up logged. Tech integration in progress; July 2026 launch target at risk without execution.
5. **Samsung CTV — Launch 5/20 (14 days out), Separate Agreement NOT executed.** Without execution before launch, Samsung standard TV Seller Office Terms apply automatically. Needs legal close this week.

## Today's Schedule (May 6)
- 11:00 AM — Apple/EverPass Integration Bi-Weekly (Hegeman + 8 Apple cross-team) [Webex — updated link from 9:45 AM email]
- 12:30 PM — Weekly Catchup (Melissa Herrington)
- 3:00 PM — Marketing/Content catchup (Christi DeVed, Mackenzie Matheson)
- ~~3:30 PM — MyBundle <> EverPass~~ **CANCELED by Jason Cohen**

## Tomorrow's Schedule (May 7)
- ⚠️ 10:30 AM — DAZN catch up (Dan Gardiner) **CONFLICT:** Mediacom Discussion same slot
- ⚠️ 10:30 AM — EverPass Mediacom Discussion (Mark Finch, Tapan Dandnaik)
- 12:00 PM — Cross Functional Standup (company-wide)
- 12:00 PM–5:00 PM — HOLD: Baylor school orientation
- 1:00 PM — Alex/Ryan (Alex Chan)
- 2:30 PM — Hardware GTM Standup
- 5:00 PM — Trung <> Ryan

## Active Partner Pulse (May 6 Fresh)
- **Charter:** Counter expected 5/6–5/9 (Holden). NBA scope reply drafted, not yet sent.
- **NESN:** Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5 — most urgent response today.
- **AccuWeather:** McCormack offering Fri 5/8 slots — reply today.
- **DAZN:** Gardiner confirmed 5/7 10:30 (rescheduled from 5/5). ⚠️ Conflicts with Mediacom.
- **Apple:** Bi-Weekly confirmed today 11:00 AM (Hegeman update 9:45 AM).
- **Monumental:** DocuSign 4/29 still pending Ryan signature. Go/No-Go HTML built 5/5.
- **Victory+:** NWSL amendment fully executed 5/2. Monitoring only.
- **DIRECTV:** Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response.
- **Samsung:** CTV launch 5/20 — Separate Agreement not executed. 14 days.
- **NBCU:** Upfront 5/11 streaming reminder received. NBA not in commercial grant.

## Pricing
2026-05-04 v2 pricing sheet applied. NFLST Early Bird (12 cells) + 8-Pay formulas updated. Partner-insights flagged across Charter, DIRECTV, Comcast, NBCU, Disney, YTTV.

critical.title: Charter — Counter expected 5/6–5/9; NBA scope reply still unsent
critical.body: Holden 5/5 00:21Z: "Made good progress, hopefully something by end of week." First soft commitment since 4/15. NBA scope reply drafted 5/5 01:43Z, awaiting Ryan's send. NBC commercial grant confirmed does NOT include NBA (three-source verification 5/5).

critical.title: NESN — Plaehn 2nd chase (5/5 17:08Z) — respond today
critical.body: Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12. Second direct chase now on record. Reputational window narrowing. Move within today or tomorrow.

critical.title: AccuWeather — McCormack scheduling Fri 5/8 call
critical.body: Proposed Fri 5/8 9:00–10:30 AM PT or 12:30–1:30 PM PT. Executable draft 11 days overdue (was due 4/25). Two-track deal: Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel. Ryan owes scheduling reply today.

critical.title: Monumental — DocuSign pending Ryan signature
critical.body: Bernheimer 4/29 sent DocuSign. 5/1 follow-up logged. Tech integration in progress. July 2026 launch target. Sign or push back.

critical.title: Samsung CTV — Launch 5/20 (14 days), Separate Agreement NOT executed
critical.body: Without execution before 5/20 launch, Samsung standard TV Seller Office Terms apply automatically. Separate Agreement drafted but not executed. Needs legal close this week.

deals.next_action: Counter expected 5/6–5/9 (Holden). NBA scope reply drafted, awaiting Ryan's send. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13.
Catch up 5/7 10:30 with Dan Gardiner (rescheduled from 5/5). ⚠️ Conflicts with Mediacom at same slot. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+ scoping. Pre-commercial.
Bi-weekly integration 5/6 11:00 AM (Hegeman). F1 Miami GP delivered 5/3. Watch IMAX expansion risk to MLS Season Pass and MLB Friday Night Baseball.
McCormack offering Fri 5/8 call slots. Reply today. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Two-track: Weather API + 24/7 FAST, targeting late-May launch.
Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5. Respond within today or tomorrow. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12.
DocuSign 4/29 (Bernheimer); 5/1 follow-up. Ryan owes signature. July 2026 launch. Go/No-Go HTML built 5/5.
CTV launch 5/20. Separate Agreement drafted, NOT executed. Without signature Samsung standard terms apply. Legal close needed this week.
NWSL amendment fully executed 2026-05-02. Monitoring only.
Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response. Rack rates NOT to be quoted.
Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share open.
Upfront 5/11 (streaming). NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering.
Feneque 4/29 on Exhibit B device multiplier (3 fix options). Catch up next week.
Fury event report status. $500K Mayweather/Pacquiao cancellation fee — counter as MG credit.
#REF! errors in Pricing tab rows 101-102, 120 must be repaired. AWS vs Uplynk ingest decision blocking.
Critical path to August 2026 NFL kickoff. Pending YTTV: SKU pricing + date, device/DRM matrix, EPG feed.
Steady-state loss vs forecast. Go/No-Go pending; price elasticity plateau above $75/mo.
April 3 Sinclair redlines vs execution copy under review. Decide 2026 vs 2027 timing; package with CHSN.
Hoffberg rate card overdue 15+ days. Reassess WBD posture in light of WBD-Paramount shareholder vote outcome.
